name: Pier 39
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Proposed North Point Park/Marina, San Francisco, California : final environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1976 city EIR detailing Pier 39's proposed 200,000 sq ft of restaurants and shops and its 'people mover' loop around the pier.

documents.title: Underwater World aquarium at Pier 39 : draft environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1988 draft EIR for the Underwater World aquarium proposed at Pier 39.

documents.title: Agenda
documents.creator: Arts Commission of San Francisco. Visual Arts Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: An Arts Commission agenda in which Pier 39 management weighs hosting the Cheemah sculpture at East Park, pending Port and BCDC approval.

documents.title: Final environmental statement, North Point Park/Marina, City and County of San Francisco : regulatory permit applications by Waterfront Recreation Facilities, Inc
documents.creator: Waterfront Recreation Facilities, Inc,United States. Army. Corps of Engineers
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1977 federal environmental statement on the Pier 39 project, including marina berthing east and west of the pier and fire-safety upgrades to its structures.
